scope: Production prompt debt audit only; no production prompts changed.

cost_assumption.label: ESTIMATED
cost_assumption.formula: token_est × executions per completed package × package volume × 3e-6

estimated_unnecessary_prompt_text_pct: 8–15% conservative; 25–35% after validator migration; 50–65% aggressive rewrite

deletion_simulations.name: Conservative
deletion_simulations.scope: Redundant + clear validator-backed repeats (Attention Mechanism, Hook V2, Funnel echo, Visual Style, Scene Type Memory prose).

deletion_simulations.name: Moderate
deletion_simulations.scope: Also collapse C1 arcs, thin Story/PPD prose, Opening Priority, Visual Narrative essay.

deletion_simulations.name: Aggressive
deletion_simulations.scope: Rebuild Presentation from Product Brain + Strategy + Candidate/DNA + safety + schema; delta Repair.

recommendation: Do not incrementally patch Presentation. Resolve conflicts C1/C2/C6, prove conservative deletions with validator tests, then rewrite Presentation and delta Repair.
